company.name: Voisli Demo Co.
company.description: We provide AI voice assistant technology for businesses to automate phone calls, meetings, and scheduling.

products.name: Voisli Voice Agent
products.description: AI-powered inbound call handler that answers customer calls, takes messages, and routes inquiries.

products.name: Voisli Outbound Caller
products.description: Automated outbound calling for reservations, appointments, and follow-ups.

products.name: Voisli Meeting Bot
products.description: AI meeting assistant that joins video calls, transcribes conversations, and generates summaries.

products.name: Voisli Enterprise Suite
products.description: Full platform access with custom integrations, dedicated support, and unlimited usage.

faq.question: What is our most selling product?
faq.answer: Our best-selling product is the Voisli Voice Agent at $49/month. It's our core inbound call handling solution.

faq.question: What hours are we available?
faq.answer: Our AI assistants are available 24/7. Human support is available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Eastern.

faq.question: Do we offer a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

faq.question: What integrations do we support?
faq.answer: We integrate with Twilio, Google Calendar, Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and any MCP-compatible AI agent like Claude.

faq.question: How does billing work?
faq.answer: All plans are billed monthly. Enterprise plans can be billed annually with a 15% discount.

faq.question: Can the AI handle multiple languages?
faq.answer: Currently the voice assistant supports English. Multi-language support is on our roadmap for Q3 2026.

policies.refund: Full refund within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked.
policies.support: Email support at support@voisli.com. Enterprise customers get dedicated Slack channel.
policies.uptime: We guarantee 99.9% uptime for all paid plans.
